$description: This file contains the category information that will tell OGN what the acceptable values for
categories are in the .ogn file under the 'categories' keyword along with descriptions of each of
the categories. Categories have an optional namespace to indicate subcategories, e.g. 'math:vector'
indicates math nodes dealing exclusively with vectors.
The contents of this file will always denote legal categories. The list can be extended by creating
another file with the same format and adding it under the 'categoryDefinitions' keyword in .ogn, or by
inserting an individual category definition in the 'category' keyword in .ogn. See the docs for details.
categoryDefinitions.constants: Nodes which provide a constant value
categoryDefinitions.event: Action Graph nodes which are event sources for the graph
categoryDefinitions.examples: Nodes which are used in documentation examples
categoryDefinitions.fileIO: Nodes relating to data stored in the file system
categoryDefinitions.flowControl: Nodes dealing with evaluation order of the graph
categoryDefinitions.geometry:analysis: Nodes dealing with the analysis of geometry representations
categoryDefinitions.geometry:deformer: Nodes that deform geometry in space
categoryDefinitions.geometry:generator: Nodes that generate different kinds of geometry
categoryDefinitions.geometry: Nodes dealing with the manipulation of geometry
categoryDefinitions.graph:action: Nodes specifically relating to action graphs
categoryDefinitions.graph:onDemand: Nodes specifically relating to on-demand graphs
categoryDefinitions.graph:postRender: Nodes specifically relating to post-render graphs
categoryDefinitions.graph:preRender: Nodes specifically relating to pre-render graphs
categoryDefinitions.graph:simulation: Nodes specifically relating to action graphs
categoryDefinitions.graph: Nodes dealing with the graph to which they belong
categoryDefinitions.input: Nodes dealing with external input sources
categoryDefinitions.internal:test: Nodes used solely for internal testing
categoryDefinitions.internal:tutorial: Nodes used solely for illustrating a node writing technique
categoryDefinitions.internal: Nodes not meant for general use
categoryDefinitions.math:array: Nodes dealing with operations on arrays
categoryDefinitions.math:casts: Nodes casting values from one type to another compatible type
categoryDefinitions.math:conversion: Nodes converting between different types of data
categoryDefinitions.sceneGraph:camera: Nodes dealing with the scene graph directly
categoryDefinitions.sceneGraph: Nodes dealing with the scene graph directly
categoryDefinitions.tutorials: Nodes which are used in a documentation tutorial
categoryDefinitions.ui: Nodes that create UI widgets and UI containers
categoryDefinitions.variables: Nodes dealing with variables on the graph
